name: safe-test-user-provisioner
description: Safe starter for automating test account provisioning on owned systems

scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix frontend install && node -e "const cp=require('child_process'); const env={...process.env, PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH:'0'}; const cmd=process.platform==='linux' ? 'npx playwright install --with-deps chromium' : 'npx playwright install chromium'; cp.execSync(cmd, {stdio:'inherit', env});"
